agents.name: Planner Agent
agents.role: Breaks down issues into actionable technical tasks.

agents.name: Builder Agent
agents.role: Generates code based on the task plan.

agents.name: QA Agent
agents.role: Writes and executes tests for the generated code.
agents.output: Test Files, Coverage Report, MR Comment

agents.name: Security Agent
agents.role: Scans code for vulnerabilities and applies patches.

agents.name: Compliance Agent
agents.role: Validates data usage and generates compliance reports.

agents.name: Deploy Agent
agents.role: Merges code and triggers deployment pipelines.

agents.name: CTO Agent
agents.role: Observes the workflow and provides an executive summary.
